title: calamus javensis var. intermedius
intro: Calamus javensis var. intermedius, also known as Lesser Indian or Calamus root, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Zingiberaceae. It is native to Southeast Asia and is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of this plant include relief from digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin irritations, as well as its ability to reduce stress and anxiety. Calamus root can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or oil, and is often used in Ayurvedic and traditional Chinese medicine practices.
